meaning: v.细看,审视,浏览,扫描n.扫描
examples: A brain scan revealed the blood clot.
Not all ISPs are equipped to scan for viruses.
How do I scan a photo and attach it to an email?
In 49 major metro areas, CT scan prices vary by more than 500 percent.
Hollister used the results of the scan to generate a computer model of the splint.
